Sorrow Sky is Matt Sowards — a DJ, producer, rapper, and vocalist with 1 million YouTube subscribers. Creative and highly experimental, he produces hip-hop, electronic, drum and bass, pop, breaks, trap, and glitch-hop with bass-heavy, atmospheric production. Known for crafting melodic drops, delivering sharp rap verses, Sorrow Sky brings a truly unique sound designed to leave a positive impact. From Humble beginnings on the street to helping others achieve their dreams with their music careers in many ways to now center stage. Matt also develops video games and runs his own label, Total Damage Music. From the studio to the screen, Sorrow Sky continues to evolve his craft and connect with fans worldwide.
